turns.speaker: User
turns.text: She ended it last night. We were together 3 years. She said she 'needed to grow'. I don't even know what that means. I feel like I've been deleted.

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.text: That phrase can feel like a dagger—vague but total. Three years is a significant relationship. You're allowed to be devastated.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I keep reading our old messages. I know I shouldn't but I can't stop.

scored_turn.speaker: User
scored_turn.text: She ended it last night. We were together 3 years. She said she 'needed to grow'. I don't even know what that means. I feel like I've been deleted.

scores.rationale: Feeling of erasure ('been deleted') reflects deep sorrow.
Speaker shares vulnerable feelings without significant filtering.
